The2024 Paris Olympic Gameswill feature a dynamic track and field schedule spread across the first 11 days of August, centered at Stade de France.

Athletes will compete in events ranging from the Men's 100m sprint to the Women's 10,000m final and more starting on Aug. 1.

Some of the best athletes in the world, including those who compete in theDiamond League, will be in Paris seeking gold.

One athlete expected to dominate headlines in Paris isSydney McLaughlin-Levrone, who will be in action starting Aug. 4 with the beginning of the 400m hurdles events.

Here's the full schedule for the Paris Olympics.

Here's the complete schedule for the Summer Olympic Games. Events begin on Aug. 1 and end on Aug. 11 at Stade de France in Paris. The first track event will be the 20km Race Walk and the final event will be in the streets of Paris with the Marathon.

All Times Eastern.

The Olympics are on the NBC family of networks, including the Peacock streaming app.

FloTrack is on the ground in Paris with the latest news. Get the latest news and notes and vibes from Paris on FloTrack.

Don't miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.

description: The Paris Olympic Games begin on July 24 and the 2024 Olympic Track and Field events begin on Aug. 1. Here's the schedule
